name: Hackathon Setup Guide
description: This guide provides a step-by-step process for setting up Featherless.ai, an AI inference platform, and integrating it into your projects.
displayed_info: This guide provides a step-by-step process for setting up Featherless.ai, an AI inference platform, and integrating it into your projects. It involves obtaining an API key and accessing the model catalog. Featherless.ai offers unlimited access to open-source AI models within a serverless environment.

flashcards.q: What is required to set up Featherless.ai?
What can you access through Featherless.ai?
What type of access does Featherless.ai provide?
What kind of models does Featherless.ai offer?
What does the setup process involve?
flashcards.a: Setting up Featherless.ai and integrating it into your projects.

flashcards.q: What is the purpose of Featherless.ai?
flashcards.a: To provide an AI inference platform with open-source models.
